mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE resource_type = #{resourceType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE resource_type = #{resourceType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_resource WHERE resource_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_resource ( resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, quantity, available_qty, location, disposal_date, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{quantity}, #{availableQty}, #{location}, #{disposalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_resource SET resource_name = #{resourceName}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, quantity = #{quantity}, available_qty = #{availableQty}, location = #{location}, disposal_date = #{disposalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_resource SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
